evidence: Contract states no real records, member lists, cultural material, eligibility data, voting data, youth records, or service cases
Provider explains source access, repository ownership, AGPL obligations, and handover rights
stop_condition: Provider refuses source or AGPL clarity

evidence: Version pin, install path, host plan, and known dependency notes
stop_condition: Version or host path is missing

evidence: Barayamal or approved custodian has admin access and backup owner is named
stop_condition: Provider controls the only repository/admin access

evidence: Decidim boot evidence, admin login evidence, environment variables, and first deploy notes
release_rule: Release setup tranche only after clear

evidence: Seed package mapped to spaces/components and safety holds cleared
stop_condition: Fake seed requests real community data

evidence: Boot, admin, spaces, components, mobile, safety, exports, and backup tests logged
stop_condition: Critical tests fail without remediation plan

evidence: Training notes, admin checklist, support runbook, and access transfer evidence
stop_condition: Handover or admin access is missing

evidence: Decision note states real pilot requires separate authority, privacy, data, cultural safety, hosting, and support approvals
release_rule: No real-data work under fake sandbox contract
stop_condition: Fake sandbox is treated as real authority

evidence: Provider confirms final deliverable is a Decidim sandbox or documented Decidim build artifact, not only static HTML
stop_condition: Static prototype is substituted for Decidim
